title: Maximum Subarray Sum with One Deletion
hints: Extend Kadane's algorithm by tracking two states: max sum ending here with no deletion and with one deletion.
For each element, the no-deletion state is standard Kadane. The one-deletion state is max of current no-deletion state (delete current) or previous one-deletion state plus current.
Carefully handle the base case and ensure the subarray remains non-empty after deletion by initializing states correctly with the first element.
